meaning: adj.没受到干扰的,安静的,镇定的
examples: The treasure had lain undisturbed for centuries.
She succeeded in working undisturbed for a few hours.
No wonder it is one of the few areas left in Nepal where snow leopards still roam undisturbed.
Because of income tax consequences, they rest undisturbed while Berkshire benefits from compounding of dividend growth.
